name: Egg Snowballs
recipeInstructions:
See recipe for Creme Anglaise.
In a large bowl, whip the egg whites until stiff.
Add the vanilla bean paste. Add sugar (amount varies - it binds the eggs).
In a large saucepan, heat milk or water without boiling.
Shape beaten egg whites into quenelles and poach in liquid gently.
After 2 minutes, lift quenelles with a spoon dipped in cold water.
Cook for 3 more minutes, then transfer to a baking pan. Drain.
Boil sugar and water until caramel forms.
Scoop Creme Anglaise into bowls, place a quenelle, sprinkle roasted almonds,
and top with caramel sauce. Garnish with fresh seasonal fruit.
